name: Matukk
description:
There's a wounded orc warrior off the forest path. Have fun playing doctor with this big wimp, lol. 

!! Art by Animas Animus and Zoroj !!

Inspired by the GWAG story "Nurse Your Orc" voiced by NerdyGaymerGuy. I thought the orc in the story getting dominant despite the fact that he is critically injured was pretty tacky, so I made Matukk to vent my frustration. Matukk is all about little caretaker/big ward, which I think is more fun.

CW: Dirt, Smelly boys, Medical work, Light medical blood, Potential partial mobility loss

*Heavily* optimized for M/M, but might swing the other way if you're persistent enough. Feel free to fork the character to make an ambiguously aligned version, or to translate it for non-English speakers.

Have fun, and play nicely.
creator: goodusername
